# Sofia Reinholt

Sofia Reinholt is VP of Regulatory Affairs at Globex and the executive champion for the CSRD readiness engagement. She is accountable to the CFO and General Counsel for timely, audit-ready disclosure and owns the double-materiality assessment process including external stakeholder outreach. Sofia brings prior NFRD reporting experience and provides strong internal momentum for the project.
